req.title: Search patients (boundary)
req.statement: A clinician shall search patients by name, MRN, or DOB; only patients in their care shall be returned. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
# Pytest Tests: Patient Search Requirements

## File Structure
```
tests/
├── conftest.py
├── test_patient_search.py
├── fixtures/
│   └── patient_data.py
```

---

## `tests/fixtures/patient_data.py`

```python
"""
Shared patient data constants and factories for patient search tests.
"""
from datetime import date, datetime, timezone
from typing import Optional
import uuid


def make_patient(
    patient_id: Optional[str] = None,
    first_name: str = "John",
    last_name: str = "Doe",
    mrn: str = "MRN0000001",
    dob: date = date(1990, 1, 1),
    assigned_clinician_id: Optional[str] = None,
) -> dict:
    """Factory function to create a patient record dictionary."""
    return {
        "patient_id": patient_id or str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "first_name": first_name,
        "last_name": last_name,
        "full_name": f"{first_name} {last_name}",
        "mrn": mrn,
        "dob": dob,
        "assigned_clinician_id": assigned_clinician_id,
        "created_at": datetime(2023, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
        "updated_at": datetime(2023, 6, 1, 12, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
    }


# ── Boundary DOB constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
DOB_MIN = date(1900, 1, 1)          # Earliest plausible DOB
DOB_MAX = date.today()               # Latest plausible DOB (today)
DOB_LEAP_DAY = date(2000, 2, 29)    # Leap-year boundary
DOB_PRE_LEAP = date(2000, 2, 28)
DOB_POST_LEAP = date(2000, 3, 1)
DOB_YEAR_START = date(1990, 1, 1)
DOB_YEAR_END = date(1990, 12, 31)

# ── Boundary MRN constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
MRN_NUMERIC_MIN = "0000000"         # All-zeros MRN
MRN_NUMERIC_MAX = "9999999"         # All-nines MRN
MRN_SINGLE_CHAR = "A"               # Single character
MRN_MAX_LENGTH = "M" + "9" * 19     # 20-character MRN (assumed max)
MRN_WITH_DASHES = "MRN-2024-00123"  # Formatted MRN
MRN_LEADING_ZEROS = "0001234"
```

"""
Pytest configuration: shared fixtures for clinician and patient objects.
"""
import pytest
from datetime import date, datetime, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch

from tests.fixtures.patient_data import make_patient, DOB_LEAP_DAY


# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Clinician Fixtures
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@pytest.fixture
def clinician_a():
    return {"clinician_id": "CLIN-001", "name": "Dr. Alice Smith"}


@pytest.fixture
def clinician_b():
    return {"clinician_id": "CLIN-002", "name": "Dr. Bob Jones"}


@pytest.fixture
def clinician_no_patients():
    return {"clinician_id": "CLIN-999", "name": "Dr. Nobody"}


# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Patient Fixtures
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@pytest.fixture
def patient_alice_under_clin_a():
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-001",
        first_name="Alice",
        last_name="Walker",
        mrn="MRN0000001",
        dob=date(1985, 6, 15),
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient_bob_under_clin_a():
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-002",
        first_name="Bob",
        last_name="Walker",
        mrn="MRN0000002",
        dob=date(1990, 3, 22),
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient_charlie_under_clin_b():
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-003",
        first_name="Charlie",
        last_name="Brown",
        mrn="MRN0000003",
        dob=date(1975, 11, 30),
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-002",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient_leap_day_dob():
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-100",
        first_name="Leap",
        last_name="Day",
        mrn="MRN0000100",
        dob=DOB_LEAP_DAY,
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient_min_dob():
    from tests.fixtures.patient_data import DOB_MIN
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-101",
        first_name="Ancient",
        last_name="Patient",
        mrn="MRN0000101",
        dob=DOB_MIN,
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient_max_dob():
    from tests.fixtures.patient_data import DOB_MAX
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-102",
        first_name="Newborn",
        last_name="Patient",
        mrn="MRN0000102",
        dob=DOB_MAX,
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient_zero_mrn():
    from tests.fixtures.patient_data import MRN_NUMERIC_MIN
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-200",
        first_name="Zero",
        last_name="MRN",
        mrn=MRN_NUMERIC_MIN,
        dob=date(1980, 1, 1),
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient_max_mrn():
    from tests.fixtures.patient_data import MRN_NUMERIC_MAX
    return make_patient(
        patient_id="PT-201",
        first_name="MaxMRN",
        last_name="Patient",
        mrn=MRN_NUMERIC_MAX,
        dob=date(1980, 1, 1),
        assigned_clinician_id="CLIN-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def all_patients(
    patient_alice_under_clin_a,
    patient_bob_under_clin_a,
    patient_charlie_under_clin_b,
    patient_leap_day_dob,
    patient_min_dob,
    patient_max_dob,
    patient_zero_mrn,
    patient_max_mrn,
):
    return [
        patient_alice_under_clin_a,
        patient_bob_under_clin_a,
        patient_charlie_under_clin_b,
        patient_leap_day_dob,
        patient_min_dob,
        patient_max_dob,
        patient_zero_mrn,
        patient_max_mrn,
    ]


# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Service / Repository Mock Fixture
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@pytest.fixture
def patient_search_service(all_patients):
    """
    Returns a mock PatientSearchService pre-loaded with the fixture patients.
    Real implementations should swap this for a test-database session.
    """
    from src.services.patient_search_service import PatientSearchService

    repo_mock = MagicMock()
    service = PatientSearchService(repository=repo_mock)

    def _search(clinician_id, name=None, mrn=None, dob=None):
        """Simulate search logic against in-memory fixture list."""
        results = [
            p for p in all_patients
            if p["assigned_clinician_id"] == clinician_id
        ]
        if name:
            name_lower = name.strip().lower()
            results = [
                p for p in results
                if name_lower in p["full_name"].lower()
            ]
        if mrn:
            results = [
                p for p in results
                if p["mrn"].upper() == mrn.strip().upper()
            ]
        if dob:
            results = [p for p in results if p["dob"] == dob]
        return results

    repo_mock.search.side_effect = _search
    service.search = _search
    return service
```

## `tests/test_patient_search.py`

```python
"""
Tests for:
  REQ-001  A clinician shall search patients by name, MRN, or DOB;
           only patients in their care shall be returned.
  REQ-001a Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.

Sections
────────
1.  Search-by-Name  (exact, partial, case-insensitive, empty, SQL-injection)
2.  Search-by-MRN   (exact, leading zeros, numeric boundaries, max length)
3.  Search-by-DOB   (exact, leap day, min/max epoch, year boundaries)
4.  Care-Team Isolation  (clinician sees only their own patients)
5.  Combined search fields
6.  Input sanitation / edge cases
7.  Timestamp boundary cases
8.  Numeric boundary cases (MRN, DOB numeric representation)
9.  Performance / load guard (optional integration marker)
"""

import pytest
from datetime import date, datetime, timezone, timedelta
from unittest.mock import MagicMock

from tests.fixtures.patient_data import (
    DOB_MIN,
    DOB_MAX,
    DOB_LEAP_DAY,
    DOB_PRE_LEAP,
    DOB_POST_LEAP,
    DOB_YEAR_START,
    DOB_YEAR_END,
    MRN_NUMERIC_MIN,
    MRN_NUMERIC_MAX,
    MRN_SINGLE_CHAR,
    MRN_MAX_LENGTH,
    MRN_WITH_DASHES,
    MRN_LEADING_ZEROS,
    make_patient,
)


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 1 – SEARCH BY NAME
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestSearchByName:
    """REQ-001: Clinician can search patients by name."""

    def test_exact_full_name_returns_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_alice_under_clin_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name="Alice Walker",
        )
        assert len(results) == 1
        assert results[0]["patient_id"] == patient_alice_under_clin_a["patient_id"]

    def test_partial_first_name_returns_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name="Ali",
        )
        assert any(p["first_name"] == "Alice" for p in results)

    def test_partial_last_name_returns_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name="Walk",
        )
        # Both Alice Walker and Bob Walker share the surname
        assert len(results) == 2

    def test_name_search_is_case_insensitive(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        for variant in ["alice walker", "ALICE WALKER", "Alice WALKER", "aLiCe WaLkEr"]:
            results = patient_search_service.search(
                clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
                name=variant,
            )
            assert len(results) == 1, f"Failed for variant: {variant}"

    def test_name_with_leading_trailing_whitespace(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name="  Alice Walker  ",
        )
        assert len(results) == 1

    def test_name_not_matching_any_patient_returns_empty(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name="Nonexistent Person",
        )
        assert results == []

    def test_empty_name_string_returns_all_patients_in_care(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        """Empty name should behave as 'no name filter'."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name="",
        )
        # Should return all patients under clinician_a (Alice, Bob, Leap, Min, Max, ZeroMRN, MaxMRN)
        assert len(results) >= 2

    def test_name_search_sql_injection_is_safe(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        """SQL injection payload must not raise an error or return unexpected data."""
        malicious = "' OR '1'='1"
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name=malicious,
        )
        assert isinstance(results, list)
        assert all(
            p["assigned_clinician_id"] == clinician_a["clinician_id"]
            for p in results
        )

    def test_name_with_special_characters(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, all_patients
    ):
        """Names with hyphens, apostrophes, accents must be handled gracefully."""
        special_patient = make_patient(
            first_name="O'Brien",
            last_name="Müller-Smith",
            mrn="MRN0099999",
            dob=date(1970, 5, 5),
            assigned_clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        all_patients.append(special_patient)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            name="O'Brien",
        )
        assert any(p["first_name"] == "O'Brien" for p in results)


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 2 – SEARCH BY MRN
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestSearchByMRN:
    """REQ-001: Clinician can search patients by MRN."""

    def test_exact_mrn_match_returns_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_alice_under_clin_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn="MRN0000001",
        )
        assert len(results) == 1
        assert results[0]["mrn"] == "MRN0000001"

    def test_mrn_wrong_value_returns_empty(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn="MRN9999999",
        )
        assert results == []

    def test_mrn_case_insensitive(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        for variant in ["mrn0000001", "MRN0000001", "Mrn0000001"]:
            results = patient_search_service.search(
                clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
                mrn=variant,
            )
            assert len(results) == 1, f"Failed for MRN variant: {variant}"

    def test_mrn_with_leading_whitespace(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn="  MRN0000001  ",
        )
        assert len(results) == 1

    # ── Numeric Boundary: all-zeros MRN ────────────────────────────────────

    def test_mrn_all_zeros_returns_correct_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_zero_mrn
    ):
        """Boundary: MRN consisting entirely of zeros."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn=MRN_NUMERIC_MIN,
        )
        assert len(results) == 1
        assert results[0]["mrn"] == MRN_NUMERIC_MIN

    def test_mrn_all_nines_returns_correct_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_max_mrn
    ):
        """Boundary: MRN consisting entirely of nines."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn=MRN_NUMERIC_MAX,
        )
        assert len(results) == 1
        assert results[0]["mrn"] == MRN_NUMERIC_MAX

    def test_mrn_leading_zeros_preserved(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, all_patients
    ):
        """Leading zeros must not be stripped (MRN is a string identifier)."""
        p = make_patient(
            mrn=MRN_LEADING_ZEROS,
            assigned_clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        all_patients.append(p)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn=MRN_LEADING_ZEROS,
        )
        assert any(r["mrn"] == MRN_LEADING_ZEROS for r in results)

    def test_mrn_single_character(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, all_patients
    ):
        """Boundary: single-character MRN."""
        p = make_patient(
            mrn=MRN_SINGLE_CHAR,
            assigned_clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        all_patients.append(p)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn=MRN_SINGLE_CHAR,
        )
        assert any(r["mrn"] == MRN_SINGLE_CHAR for r in results)

    def test_mrn_maximum_length(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, all_patients
    ):
        """Boundary: MRN at system maximum length (20 characters assumed)."""
        p = make_patient(
            mrn=MRN_MAX_LENGTH,
            assigned_clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        all_patients.append(p)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn=MRN_MAX_LENGTH,
        )
        assert any(r["mrn"] == MRN_MAX_LENGTH for r in results)

    def test_mrn_formatted_with_dashes(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, all_patients
    ):
        """MRN with internal dashes should match correctly."""
        p = make_patient(
            mrn=MRN_WITH_DASHES,
            assigned_clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        all_patients.append(p)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            mrn=MRN_WITH_DASHES,
        )
        assert any(r["mrn"] == MRN_WITH_DASHES for r in results)

    def test_mrn_exceeds_max_length_raises_or_returns_empty(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        """Input MRN longer than max length must not crash the system."""
        oversized_mrn = "X" * 256
        try:
            results = patient_search_service.search(
                clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
                mrn=oversized_mrn,
            )
            assert isinstance(results, list)
        except (ValueError, OverflowError):
            pass  # Raising a well-typed error is also acceptable


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 3 – SEARCH BY DATE OF BIRTH
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestSearchByDOB:
    """REQ-001: Clinician can search patients by DOB."""

    def test_exact_dob_match_returns_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_alice_under_clin_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=date(1985, 6, 15),
        )
        assert len(results) == 1
        assert results[0]["patient_id"] == "PT-001"

    def test_dob_no_match_returns_empty(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=date(2099, 12, 31),
        )
        assert results == []

    # ── Leap Day Boundary ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def test_dob_leap_day_feb_29_exact_match(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_leap_day_dob
    ):
        """Boundary: Feb 29 on a leap year must match exactly."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=DOB_LEAP_DAY,
        )
        assert any(p["patient_id"] == "PT-100" for p in results)

    def test_dob_feb_28_does_not_match_leap_day_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_leap_day_dob
    ):
        """Feb 28 must NOT match the Feb 29 patient."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=DOB_PRE_LEAP,
        )
        assert not any(p["patient_id"] == "PT-100" for p in results)

    def test_dob_march_1_does_not_match_leap_day_patient(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_leap_day_dob
    ):
        """March 1 must NOT match the Feb 29 patient."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=DOB_POST_LEAP,
        )
        assert not any(p["patient_id"] == "PT-100" for p in results)

    def test_dob_non_leap_year_feb_29_is_invalid(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        """Feb 29 in a non-leap year must raise ValueError."""
        with pytest.raises((ValueError, TypeError)):
            _ = date(1999, 2, 29)  # 1999 is not a leap year

    # ── Minimum DOB Boundary ───────────────────────────────────────────────

    def test_dob_minimum_date_jan_1_1900(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_min_dob
    ):
        """Boundary: DOB at the earliest allowed date."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=DOB_MIN,
        )
        assert any(p["patient_id"] == "PT-101" for p in results)

    def test_dob_one_day_before_minimum_returns_empty(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        """One day before DOB_MIN must return no results."""
        one_before_min = DOB_MIN - timedelta(days=1)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=one_before_min,
        )
        assert results == []

    # ── Maximum DOB Boundary ───────────────────────────────────────────────

    def test_dob_maximum_date_today(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, patient_max_dob
    ):
        """Boundary: DOB at today's date (newborn)."""
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=DOB_MAX,
        )
        assert any(p["patient_id"] == "PT-102" for p in results)

    def test_dob_one_day_after_today_raises_or_empty(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a
    ):
        """DOB in the future (tomorrow) is invalid and must not return data."""
        future_dob = date.today() + timedelta(days=1)
        try:
            results = patient_search_service.search(
                clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
                dob=future_dob,
            )
            assert results == [], "Future DOB must return no patients"
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            pass  # Raising a typed error is also acceptable

    # ── Year Boundary ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    def test_dob_first_day_of_year(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, all_patients
    ):
        p = make_patient(
            mrn="MRN_YRSTART",
            dob=DOB_YEAR_START,
            assigned_clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        all_patients.append(p)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=DOB_YEAR_START,
        )
        assert any(r["dob"] == DOB_YEAR_START for r in results)

    def test_dob_last_day_of_year(
        self, patient_search_service, clinician_a, all_patients
    ):
        p = make_patient(
            mrn="MRN_YREND",
            dob=DOB_YEAR_END,
            assigned_clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        all_patients.append(p)
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
            dob=DOB_YEAR_END,
        )
        assert any(r["dob"] == DOB_YEAR_END for r in results)


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 4 – CARE-TEAM ISOLATION
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class TestCareTeamIsolation:
    """REQ-001: Only patients in the clinician's care shall be returned."""

    def test_clinician_a_does_not_see_clinician_b_patients(
        self,
        patient_search_service,
        clinician_a,
        patient_charlie_under_clin_b,
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_a["clinician_id"],
        )
        patient_ids = [p["patient_id"] for p in results]
        assert patient_charlie_under_clin_b["patient_id"] not in patient_ids

    def test_clinician_b_does_not_see_clinician_a_patients(
        self,
        patient_search_service,
        clinician_b,
        patient_alice_under_clin_a,
        patient_bob_under_clin_a,
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_b["clinician_id"],
        )
        patient_ids = [p["patient_id"] for p in results]
        assert patient_alice_under_clin_a["patient_id"] not in patient_ids
        assert patient_bob_under_clin_a["patient_id"] not in patient_ids

    def test_clinician_b_can_find_their_own_patient_by_name(
        self,
        patient_search_service,
        clinician_b,
        patient_charlie_under_clin_b,
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_b["clinician_id"],
            name="Charlie",
        )
        assert len(results) == 1
        assert results[0]["patient_id"] == patient_charlie_under_clin_b["patient_id"]

    def test_clinician_b_searching_clinician_a_patient_by_name_returns_empty(
        self,
        patient_search_service,
        clinician_b,
    ):
        results = patient_search_service.search(
            clinician_id=clinician_b["clinician_id"],
            name="Alice Walker",
        )

"""
Shared patient data constants and factories for patient search tests.
"""
from datetime import date, datetime, timezone
from typing import Optional
import uuid


def make_patient(
    patient_id: Optional[str] = None,
    first_name: str = "John",
    last_name: str = "Doe",
    mrn: str = "MRN0000001",
    dob: date = date(1990, 1, 1),
    assigned_clinician_id: Optional[str] = None,
) -> dict:
    """Factory function to create a patient record dictionary."""
    return {
        "patient_id": patient_id or str(uuid.uuid4()),
        "first_name": first_name,
        "last_name": last_name,
        "full_name": f"{first_name} {last_name}",
        "mrn": mrn,
        "dob": dob,
        "assigned_clinician_id": assigned_clinician_id,
        "created_at": datetime(2023, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
        "updated_at": datetime(2023, 6, 1, 12, 0, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
    }


# ── Boundary DOB constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
DOB_MIN = date(1900, 1, 1)          # Earliest plausible DOB
DOB_MAX = date.today()               # Latest plausible DOB (today)
DOB_LEAP_DAY = date(2000, 2, 29)    # Leap-year boundary
DOB_PRE_LEAP = date(2000, 2, 28)
DOB_POST_LEAP = date(2000, 3, 1)
DOB_YEAR_START = date(1990, 1, 1)
DOB_YEAR_END = date(1990, 12, 31)

# ── Boundary MRN constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
MRN_NUMERIC_MIN = "0000000"         # All-zeros MRN
MRN_NUMERIC_MAX = "9999999"         # All-nines MRN
MRN_SINGLE_CHAR = "A"               # Single character
MRN_MAX_LENGTH = "M" + "9" * 19     # 20-character MRN (assumed max)
MRN_WITH_DASHES = "MRN-2024-00123"  # Formatted MRN
MRN_LEADING_ZEROS = "0001234"
```
